languages.text: Лария готова арестовать Изимонда на основании собранных улик, однако Вольный Торговец хочет сперва переговорить с блюстителем.

traits.locale_text: Лария готова арестовать Изимонда на основании собранных улик, однако Вольный Торговец хочет сперва переговорить с блюстителем.

languages.text: Laria is prepared to arrest Isimond based on the evidence gathered, but the Rogue Trader wishes to speak with the enforcer first.

languages.text: Laria ist bereit, Isimond basierend auf den gesammelten Beweisen zu verhaften, aber {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} möchte zuerst mit dem Enforcer reden.
languages.original_text: Laria is prepared to arrest Isimond based on the evidence gathered, but the Rogue Trader wishes to speak with the enforcer first.

traits.locale_text: Laria ist bereit, Isimond basierend auf den gesammelten Beweisen zu verhaften, aber {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} möchte zuerst mit dem Enforcer reden.

languages.text: Laria est prête à arrêter Isimond sur la base des preuves obtenues, mais {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} souhaite d'abord parler au prévôt.
languages.original_text: Laria is prepared to arrest Isimond based on the evidence gathered, but the Rogue Trader wishes to speak with the enforcer first.

traits.locale_text: Laria est prête à arrêter Isimond sur la base des preuves obtenues, mais {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} souhaite d'abord parler au prévôt.

languages.text: 菈丽雅准备根据现有证据逮捕伊西蒙德，但行商浪人想先跟这个执法者谈谈。
languages.original_text: Laria is prepared to arrest Isimond based on the evidence gathered, but the Rogue Trader wishes to speak with the enforcer first.

traits.locale_text: 菈丽雅准备根据现有证据逮捕伊西蒙德，但行商浪人想先跟这个执法者谈谈。

languages.text: Laria está dispuesta a arrestar a Isimond basándose en las pruebas recabadas, pero {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente desea hablar con el guardia primero.
languages.original_text: Laria is prepared to arrest Isimond based on the evidence gathered, but the Rogue Trader wishes to speak with the enforcer first.

traits.locale_text: Laria está dispuesta a arrestar a Isimond basándose en las pruebas recabadas, pero {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente desea hablar con el guardia primero.

languages.text: ラリアは集めた証拠に基づいてイシモンドを逮捕する用意があるが、自由商人はまず監督と話をしたいという。
languages.original_text: Laria is ready to arrest Isimond based on the evidence gathered, but the Free Trader wants to talk to the overseer first.

languages.text: Laria, toplanan kanıtlara dayanarak İsimond'u tutuklamaya hazır ancak Hür Tacir önce infazcıyla konuşmak istiyor.
